definitions: A group of four art museums in the United Kingdom: Tate Britain, Tate Modern, Tate Liverpool, and Tate St Ives. It houses the UK's national collection of British art, and international modern and contemporary art.
The original Tate Gallery, now known as Tate Britain, located in London, England, which primarily displays historical British art.
examples: We spent the afternoon exploring the Tate Gallery.
The new exhibition at the Tate Gallery is highly anticipated.
Many famous works are housed within the Tate Gallery.
